runs.text: Hungry to get out on the trail this spring? Stock up during our limited time sale to fuel your springtime explorations.

blockMeta.name: We can get you out of a camp…

runs.text: We can get you out of a camping food rut with our guide to delicious camp-friendly meals. Like this hearty breakfast burrito stuffed with our Venison Links.

Bottom photo: Camping Breakfast Burritos. Amy Kumler

Orders over $49 (excluding tax, other discounts & shipping) on the Patagonia Provisions website qualify for free ground shipping. This offer is valid for orders shipped to addresses in the United States only. Offer valid on first subscription purchase only.
